titles.ar: بَابٌ فِي سُكُونِ الْمُؤْمِنِ إِلَى الْمُؤْمِنِ
titles.en: Chapter 102 – Regarding the tranquility of the Momin to the Momin

titles.ar: بَابٌ فِي سُكُونِ الْمُؤْمِنِ إِلَى الْمُؤْمِنِ
titles.en: Chapter 102 – Regarding the tranquility of the Momin to the Momin

segments: إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ لَيَسْكُنُ إِلَى الْمُؤْمِنِ كَمَا يَسْكُنُ الظَّمْآنُ إِلَى الْمَاءِ الْبَارِدِ .
arabic.text: إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ لَيَسْكُنُ إِلَى الْمُؤْمِنِ كَمَا يَسْكُنُ الظَّمْآنُ إِلَى الْمَاءِ الْبَارِدِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa Bin Ubeyud, from Yunus, from the one who mentioned it,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The Momin brings tranquillity to the Momin just as the thirsty one gets tranquilled to the cold water’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa Bin Ubeyud, from Yunus, from the one who mentioned it, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The Momin brings tranquillity to the Momin just as the thirsty one gets tranquilled to the cold water’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa ibn ‘Ubayd from Yunus from those he has mentioned (in his book) from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “A believer finds comfort with another believer just as a thirsty person finds relief from cool water.”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa ibn ‘Ubayd from Yunus from those he has mentioned (in his book) from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “A believer finds comfort with another believer just as a thirsty person finds relief from cool water.”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/300)
gradings.label: مرسل
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/300)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى بْنِ عُبَيْدٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ عَمَّنْ ذَكَرَهُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
